setup.step1: Purchase a domain from a registrar (e.g.: GoDaddy, Namecheap, Google Domains)

setup.step3: Add your domain here on Clicknich using the "Add Domain" button
setup.step4: Wait for DNS propagation (usually 15 minutes to 2 hours)

content_modal.attachments_hint: Complementary PDFs, spreadsheets, supporting images, etc.

image_uploader.click_to_select: Klicken Sie, um ein Bild auszuwählen
image_uploader.file_size_limit: JPG, PNG, GIF bis zu 5 MB

install_app.install_icon_address: Make sure you are using Safari (Apple's default browser)
install_app.ios_share_instruction: In the bottom bar, tap the share icon (square with arrow pointing up)
install_app.ios_add_home_desc: Scroll down in the menu and select "Add to Home Screen"
install_app.ios_confirm_desc: The app icon will appear on your home screen
install_app.app_shortcut: The app will appear as an icon on your home screen. Tap it to access!
install_app.ensure_chrome: Make sure you are using Google Chrome
install_app.select_install: Tap "Add to Home screen" or "Install app"
install_app.android_done_desc: The app icon will appear on your home screen. Tap it to access!
install_app.install_icon_address_bar: In the address bar, near the end
install_app.popup_install: A popup will appear asking if you want to install the app
install_app.app_desktop_menu: The app will appear on the desktop or start menu
install_app.instant_access: Quick access directly from your home screen
install_app.clean_interface: Full screen interface, no navigation bar
install_app.add_native: Add {appName} to your home screen for quick access
install_app.benefits_title: Benefits of adding to home screen

client_access.email_only: Email only: Client enters only their email to access
client_access.email_password: Email + Password: Client logs in with email and password
client_access.purchase_code: Purchase Code: Client enters the code received with purchase
client_access.email_desc: Send the link directly in the purchase confirmation email along with clear access instructions.
client_access.whatsapp_desc: Share the link via WhatsApp for quick and direct access to the purchased product.
client_access.qr_desc: Generate QR codes to facilitate access at events or in printed materials.
client_access.direct_link_desc: Use the link on thank you pages, member areas or other strategic locations.
